title: HyperPortalBreaking
description: Destroy end portal frames in survival.
body:
***With this plugin, you can break end portal frames in survival.***

**Supported Plugins:**
*The following plugins are supported. You may enable/disable the hooks in the config.*
WorldGuard
FabledSkyblock
SuperiorSkyblock2
BentoBox
Lands

**Other Information:**
*Join the Discord to suggest things to be added/changed and more.*
Discord: https://discord.gg/KSHtf5t
Donations: https://paypal.me/AustinFRG
